scene.name: TraderFrame - Evidence Gate
scene.purpose: To visually and interactively represent the core decision-making process of TraderFrame through a structured, evidence-based narrative.

main_narrative.title: Evidence Gate
main_narrative.description: A central interactive interface that represents the gate through which market evidence is filtered, challenged, approved, and recorded. This is the core decision-making engine of TraderFrame.

components.name: Evidence Filter
components.description: A visual representation of how raw market data is processed and filtered for relevance and credibility.

components.name: Challenge Panel
components.description: A dynamic interface where users can interrogate and challenge the validity of evidence through interactive prompts and data cross-checks.

components.name: Approval Ledger
components.description: A transparent, immutable record of approved evidence and decisions, visualized as a blockchain-like ledger.
A customizable panel that allows users to adjust filtering parameters, set risk thresholds, and manage their own evidence workflow.

components.name: Risk Awareness Dashboard
components.description: A real-time visualization of risk exposure, calibrated to the user’s portfolio and current market conditions.

environment.name: Calm Precision Workspace
environment.description: A clean, minimalistic environment that reflects the brand's emphasis on clarity, control, and precision. The space is designed for focus and decision-making, with subtle ambient lighting and a neutral color palette.

assets.name: Evidence Gate Interface
assets.description: A modular, interactive interface that serves as the central hub for evidence processing. Features layered panels for filtering, challenge, approval, and recording.

assets.name: Market Data Stream
assets.description: A flowing, animated data stream that represents incoming market evidence. Data points are color-coded and animated to reflect their credibility and relevance.

assets.name: Blockchain Ledger Visualization
assets.description: A stylized blockchain-like structure that visually represents the immutable record of approved evidence and decisions.

assets.name: Risk Indicator
assets.description: A dynamic, real-time risk indicator that adjusts based on user input and market conditions. Visualized as a rotating, translucent sphere with color-coded zones.

assets.name: User Control Panel
assets.description: A modular panel that allows users to customize their workflow, set risk thresholds, and manage their evidence filtering preferences.

color_palette: Soft blues for trust and clarity
Warm oranges for risk and alert
Cool greens for data flow and transparency
style_guidelines.typography: Clean, sans-serif fonts for readability and precision
style_guidelines.lighting: Subtle ambient lighting with directional highlights to emphasize key elements

interactivity_guidelines.user_controls: Allow for real-time adjustment of filtering parameters, risk thresholds, and evidence validation
interactivity_guidelines.data_flow: Visualize data flow and credibility through animated transitions and color-coded feedback
interactivity_guidelines.decision_logging: Provide a visual record of decisions made, with timestamps and user annotations
